[2018-03-23 17:27] http404error: And you're going to condone the rule-bending by MasN under the excuse "I can't be assed to look at this channel"?
[2018-03-23 17:28] iminabearsuit: I responded to Masn, that he was sad no one judged his unit.
[2018-03-23 17:28] iminabearsuit: Because I can't be bothered considering every unit I see posted there.
[2018-03-23 17:28] http404error: There's a spam rule and an etiquette note about not deliberately annoying people
[2018-03-23 17:28] http404error: Are those not enforceable?
[2018-03-23 17:29] iminabearsuit: He's posting a lot, but it's not spam.
[2018-03-23 17:29] masn6811 (Masne98888): i dont want content in the channel like the ammolite stuff i posted either. but if that gets banned, im happy with it if SSP's bans are as well
[2018-03-23 17:29] iminabearsuit: And he's not trying to be annoying.
[2018-03-23 17:29] http404error: MasN was trying to be annoying
[2018-03-23 17:29] http404error: He just said as much
[2018-03-23 17:29] masn6811 (Masne98888): where do you draw the line
[2018-03-23 17:29] masn6811 (Masne98888): and yes, i did say as much
[2018-03-23 17:29] masn6811 (Masne98888): the thing i hate about rules that are more about intent than actions
[2018-03-23 17:30] http404error: If the @Mod Team is not going to enforce the rules then why bother having them??
[2018-03-23 17:30] masn6811 (Masne98888): is that you are giving me an incentive to not be transparent about my motivations
[2018-03-23 17:30] http404error: Regardless of your motivations you were clearly spamming
[2018-03-23 17:30] masn6811 (Masne98888): like if this becomes policy, then you might see a lot of being being annoying, but not saying that they are trying to be annoying
[2018-03-23 17:30] steel0229e (Steel): I gave up on reading that channel long ago
[2018-03-23 17:30] p0lari (Polari): Are you seriously advicating taking action against masn but not ssp?
[2018-03-23 17:30] http404error: There's even a rule about that: "- Don't try to circumvent the rules."
[2018-03-23 17:30] masn6811 (Masne98888): and if you say i was 'clearly spamming', but SSP was not, I have no idea where you plan to draw the line
[2018-03-23 17:30] steel0229e (Steel): sry if I am not enforcing rules, SSP makes me genuinely pissed
[2018-03-23 17:31] steel0229e (Steel): all the low value crap kinda makes quality discussion fade
[2018-03-23 17:31] http404error: Then make me a moderator so I can police the damn channel
[2018-03-23 17:31] http404error: Or help advocate for rules that would make it higher-quality
[2018-03-23 17:31] steel0229e (Steel): honestly we can make a protest in reddit to ban SSP
[2018-03-23 17:31] masn6811 (Masne98888): @http404error That rule is also about intent. And you are again, just incentivize me to say "I'm not circumventing the rules."
[2018-03-23 17:31] steel0229e (Steel): if enough people want him banned we can get rid of him
[2018-03-23 17:31] p0lari (Polari): Could you answer my yes/no question, I'm genuinely curious
[2018-03-23 17:32] masn6811 (Masne98888): it's the exact same complaint I've had with loonark's intent-based rules
[2018-03-23 17:32] http404error: Your motivations were pretty clear already MasN. I'm not advocating for action against you though
[2018-03-23 17:32] http404error: I just think you should complain normally instead of being an ass
[2018-03-23 17:32] http404error: to try to make some kind of point or something
[2018-03-23 17:32] masn6811 (Masne98888): and you saw exactly how well that turned out
